name: Planka
compose:
name: slashnode-planka
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/plankanban/planka:2.1.1
    container_name: planka-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      BASE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8546
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres@planka-db/planka
      DEFAULT_ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      DEFAULT_ADMIN_NAME: Umbrel
      DEFAULT_ADMIN_USERNAME: umbrel
      DEFAULT_ADMIN_EMAIL: umbrel@umbrel.local
      SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      TRUST_PROXY: '0'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8546:1337
  db:
    image: postgres:16.13-alpine3.23
    container_name: planka-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: planka
      POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD: trust
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-planka_db_data-db
